decomposition_signals.multi_owns_split: by stage ownership: lacouncil (stages 1-3, 4b) vs capability-architect (stage 4) vs delivery-reviewer (stage 5). Lifecycle is one project, scored once.

patterns_check.result: governance/lacouncil patterns recurring (9/22 occurrences) but covered by existing workflows/structural-change-pipeline.yaml; no new knowledge or registry entry required.

stages.name: investigate
stages.rationale: Exempt under triggers.exempt (allowlisted). 5 Whys + Fishbone on fork-vs-submodule redundancy.

stages.name: propose
stages.rationale: Exempt under triggers.exempt (allowlisted). New proposal with strategy=supermaioria.

stages.name: council_vote
stages.rationale: Conselho governance dispatch is exempt per triggers.exempt.scope.dispatch_types CONCELHO_GOVERNANCE and LACOUNCIL 726be80b.

stages.name: tally
stages.rationale: Exempt under triggers.exempt (allowlisted). Confirms Conselho outcome before stage 5.

stages.name: implement
tools: install submodule at ../lacareerops/.vendored/career-ops pinned to known-good upstream tag
implement lacareerops.sync (returns drift report; does NOT auto-update pinned commit)
stages.rationale: Implementation of an approved structural proposal. WDL gate is happy path (this verdict is READY).
stages.exit_criteria: submodule installed, registry updated, ADR-004 exists, lacareerops.sync MCP tool callable and returns drift report

stages.name: validate
stages.rationale: Per workflows/structural-change-pipeline.yaml; validates HR#1-11, captures preflight wdl-gate exit_code into checklist.md.
exit_criteria: checklist.md produced with exit_code from preflight_wdl_gate
submodule-boot-check passes (pinned commit, not unpinned HEAD)
lacareerops.sync tool smoke test returns drift report
P0-15 audit confirms no unmarked synthetic data
no implementation code leaked into LAOS workspace

stages.name: push
stages.rationale: Regime A: structural change approved by Conselho + validated by delivery-reviewer MUST be pushed to GitHub within the same session.
stages.exit_criteria: git push origin main returns 0; remote sha matches local sha

ready: all 7 stages completed in sequence (5 conditional gates satisfied)
defer: upstream_api_unstable: santifer/career-ops recent commits break the MCP wrapper contract
missing_config: user has not yet provided config/profile.yml for the submodule path
laos_infra_issue: preflight_check.py returns non-zero on a non-WDL gate sub-check
escalate: governance_crisis: Conselho vote deadlocks or two cycles of voting do not produce supermaioria
career_ops_license_change: upstream relicensing invalidates the fork-vs-submodule decision space

simple_task_exemption.reason: Three of four decomposition signals fire (conjunction, multi_owns, temporal). Full readiness path applies.
